items.name_en: Burberry New Exquisite Crossbody Bag, Original Quality! Made of selected cotton canvas with exquisite leather details. Features the brand's Horseferry print and exquisite three rivets. Can be worn crossbody or worn as a handbag by removing the strap. 18 x 8 x 12cm

items.name_en: Burberry Exquisite Round 'Louise' Bag, made from the brand's iconic eco-friendly canvas. This eco-friendly material is primarily made from renewable resources, requiring less water and generating less carbon dioxide compared to traditional coated canvas. The bag is named after Queen Victoria's daughter Louise, who was also an artist and advocate for gender equality. Can be worn crossbody or worn as a handbag by removing the strap. 17 x 7 x 17cm

items.name_en: ❤Burberry Pure Original London Check Eco-Canvas and Leather Tote Bag. Inspired by vintage totes, made from durable eco-canvas with a structured shape. Waterproof, scratch-resistant, and wear-resistant. The classic check is easy to clean and resists fading. Features smooth cowhide trim and refined white stitching! This color combination is stunning. The bag is eye-catching and super practical. Features a front magnetic flap pocket with the brand lettering logo. Open top with a zippered interior pocket. Extra-large capacity. Can be carried by the reinforced top handle or with a detachable shoulder strap. A low-key appearance with premium texture, offering a subtle luxury feel. Lightweight and easy to match. A perfect everyday bag that combines practicality and style. You can't go wrong with this!
